# Barred Owl

*Strix varia*

Large, round-headed, dark-eyed owl of wet woodland. Best known by voice — the
rhythmic *"who-cooks-for-you, who-cooks-for-you-all."*

> Heard far more often than seen. Every record here so far is call-only.

## Where seen (heard)

- [Cedar Marsh Boardwalk](../../trails/cedar-marsh.md), the cedars at the
  turnaround.

## On these walks

- [2026-05-09](../../daily/2026-05-09.md) — daytime call, unusual.
